spec_match.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verified the first note cell is a real contenteditable overflow target with computed text-overflow:ellipsis during focus and text selection. The ChromeStatus link was corrected to feature 5146265241387008.

interactive.rationale: The grid includes reset, long-fill, short-fill, focus-first-note, and select-first-note controls, plus editable table cells that can be clicked or tabbed through directly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The spreadsheet-style copy now matches the live cell interaction and explains Chrome 148 interaction rendering rather than an authored text-overflow change.

edge_cases.rationale: The short-fill control exercises a no-overflow note cell and the probe reports that no ellipsis interaction is needed when the content fits.

references.rationale: The labelled references section links to ChromeStatus feature 5146265241387008, CSS Overflow 3 ellipsis interaction, the Chrome 148 beta note, and MDN text-overflow.

design_system.rationale: The button hover rule now pairs its background override with an explicit colour override, and new probe UI uses shared CSS variables.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP on Chrome/151 verified first-note focus and selection as active overflowing ellipsis states, the short-note edge as non-overflowing, corrected references, and no console or network errors. The feature conformance route reported 5 PASS / 0 FAIL.
